sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zingsang, zingsol a tumma diak ahi zongin,
Khua hong vakin, ni a suah ciang ahi
Minthanna tawh dimin, Jesuh hong pai mu ding,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw, Topa cikciang hi ding hiam?
Ko kiang Nong pai kik ding,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zan khuamial sung ihsip laitak zong hita leh;
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vantung mi in Hosanna ci’n a
Mun khempeuh ah kiza ding hi, vantung tun ciang;
Vantung mi siangthote in a cing ding uh
Amah a umte hong khop ciang.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Si lo-in lungdamin vantungah i pai ding,
gen theihna, natnate om nawnlo ding;
Pasian tawh meii tung tuangin vantung i pai ding.
